corrections.note: Printed punctuation is middle dot, not comma.

corrections.current: καὶ τί ἀπαναίνῃ ἐν εὐδοκίᾳ Ὑψίστου;
corrections.correct: καὶ τί ἀπαναίνῃ ἐν εὐδοκίᾳ Ὑψίστου;
corrections.note: Image shows Ὑψίστου with smooth breathing and acute; transcription capitalization is fine. No change needed except ensure printed form is read as Ὑψίστου; leaving as-is would be acceptable, so this is borderline.
Lemma and variant are both misread: printed apparatus has αλογησει] αλγησει.

corrections.current: την ψυχην] om την ℵA ℵAC
corrections.correct: την ψυχην] om την ℵ A ℵAC

corrections.note: Correct siglum notation is ℵ* c.a, not merged ℵ*ca.

corrections.current: om εν ι° ℵ* (hab εν ℵc.c vid)
corrections.correct: om εν 1° ℵ* (hab εν ℵc.c vid)
corrections.note: Printed symbol is numeral 1 with degree sign, not Greek iota.
Lemma in apparatus carries accent in print.

corrections.correct: εγκατελείπετε] εγκατελιπετε B* ℵ (ενκ.) εγκαταλειπατε C
corrections.note: Printed sigla are separated: B* ℵ.

uncertain.note: Breathing/accent on Ὕψιστου/Ὑψίστου is small in image; transcription may already be acceptable.

notes: Running head and body largely match. Left-margin line numbers and verse numerals are transcribed as in source layout; no line-number leakage into body text beyond existing editorial numbering. Main definite issues are in apparatus sigla/reading decoding and one body punctuation mark.
